architecture.summary: Single-file change: remove TierBadge rendering from skill detail page, keep TrustBadge. No architectural impact.

integrations.summary: N/A - no integrations affected. TierBadge component stays for other pages. No API changes.

ui-ux.summary: Badge row simplifies from two badges to one. TrustBadge (T0-T4) is the richer signal. TaintWarning component separately handles tainted state.

performance.summary: N/A - removing one React component render, marginal improvement.

security.summary: N/A - trust tier display is informational only, not a security control.

edge-cases.summary: Tainted skills: covered by separate TaintWarning component (line 248). Missing trustTier: defaults to T1 in data.ts. Blocked skills: T0 BLOCKED shown by TrustBadge.
